channel.title: Test Security News
channel.description: Deterministic local test source for Vendor Threat Watch

item.title: Hackers exploit CyberArk PAM zero-day to steal privileged credentials
item.description: Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical zero-day vulnerability in CyberArk Privileged Access Manager, tracked as CVE-2026-21001, to extract privileged account credentials from enterprise vaults, security researchers warned on Monday.

item.title: CyberArk vault flaw now under mass exploitation, ransomware gangs join in
item.description: The recently disclosed CyberArk Privileged Access Manager vulnerability CVE-2026-21001 is now being exploited at scale, with ransomware affiliates joining the initial wave of targeted attacks, according to incident responders.

item.title: SailPoint IdentityIQ patches high-severity access control bypass
item.description: SailPoint has released security updates for IdentityIQ addressing a high-severity vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-22002, that allows authenticated users to escalate their entitlements beyond assigned roles.

item.title: Zscaler warns of phishing campaign abusing ZIA authentication pages
item.description: Zscaler has issued an advisory warning customers about a phishing campaign that clones Zscaler Internet Access authentication pages to harvest corporate credentials from remote workers.

item.title: Test Security News announces annual company picnic and awards
item.description: Test Security News is delighted to announce its annual company picnic, taking place next month at Riverside Park.
